## Closes

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## PR title format

Use a Conventional Commits prefix: `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `a11y:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`, etc.
The PR title becomes the commit message when squash-merged, so make it descriptive.

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Accessibility impact

Describe how this change affects accessibility workflows, or write "No accessibility impact."

If you include screenshots or images, they must have descriptive alt text in the Markdown:
`![Describe what the image shows](url)` — not just "screenshot" or "image."

## Testing

- [ ] Local run completed
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated
- [ ] Manual verification done
- [ ] Accessibility testing done (if the change affects the UI or announcements)

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] No secrets or private data added
- [ ] This is ready for review (not a draft)
